subject: fix(ui): fix modals hidden by DaisyUI modal class + tab border/switching issues
body:
BaseModal's inner div used the 'modal' CSS class which collides with DaisyUI v5's
.modal component (sets visibility:hidden, pointer-events:none by default). Removed
the class so modal content renders visibly above the backdrop overlay.

ViewSwitcher tabs: replaced border-l-0 approach with -ml-px negative margin overlap
so the active tab's primary border shows on all sides. Added z-[1] to active tab so
its border renders above adjacent inactive tabs. Added touch-manipulation to prevent
300ms mobile tap delay that caused double-tap requirement.

Tags: ui, modals, tabs, daisyui, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bug-fixes
